headlines.title: Iranian commander threatens shipping in Gulf and Red Sea if US naval blockade continues
More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
Trump says Iran talks could resume 'over next two days' as US says ships turned back by blockade
Four killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
Magyar calls for fast handover of power in talks with Hungary's president
International community has failed in Sudan, says British Foreign Minister
Australia to raise defence spending to 3% of GDP by 2033
Nigeria orders investigation into military airstrike that left at least 200 feared dead
Ukraine regained control of nearly 50 sq km of territory from Russia in March
Trump claims China has agreed not to provide weapons to Iran
Spain finalizes amnesty measure for potentially hundreds of thousands of immigrants
US wholesale prices surged 4% last month after war in Iran sent energy prices flying

summary: Major developments include the escalating US-Iran tensions with a naval blockade and threats to shipping routes, a tragic school shooting in Turkey, political transitions in Hungary, ongoing concerns in Sudan, and significant defense policy shifts in Australia. Economic impacts from the Iran conflict are being felt globally through rising energy prices.
